name: Peanut Butter and Jelly Jewels
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking soda and salt; set aside.
2. In a large mixer bowl, combine sugars. Add peanut butter and butter; beat until smooth and creamy.
3. Add egg and vanilla extract; mix well.
4. Gradually beat in the flour mixture just until blended.
5. Refrigerate, covered, at least 1 hour.
6. Preheat oven to 375°F.
7. Shape dough into 1-inch balls. Place on unbuttered cookie sheets, 1 1/2 inches apart.
8. Use the handle of a wooden spoon to make deep indentations in the center of each ball.
9. Bake 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned and set.
10. Cool on cookie sheets until firm enough to lift.
11. Transfer to wire racks to cool completely.
12. Fill centers with cherry preserves or glace cherries.
